scripts.doctor:windows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "function Show-Tool($name) { $cmd = Get-Command $name -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { $cmd | ForEach-Object { Write-Host ($name + ': ' + $_.Source) } } else { Write-Host ($name + ': not found') } }; Write-Host '== Rust =='; rustc --version; cargo --version; Write-Host ''; Write-Host '== Rustup =='; rustup show; Write-Host ''; Write-Host '== Installed targets =='; rustup target list --installed; Write-Host ''; Write-Host '== Tool locations =='; Show-Tool cargo; Show-Tool rustc; Show-Tool link; Show-Tool cl; exit 0"
